title: Junior Instructional Designer at SRM University Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at SRM University Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
SRM University Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Gwalior operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About SRM University Holdings Services:
SRM University Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University Holdings Services!
